# heraldstack

> heraldstack is a multi-platform ai agent collective operating across claude code (shannon), kiro (haunting), goose (gander), gemini cli (ibeji), and github copilot (squad). this repo is the canonical source of persona identity, architectural decisions, and shared patterns. collective repos hold variant duty; this repo holds character identity.

## pull instructions

recommended clone for agent workers:

```
gh repo clone heraldstack/heraldstack ~/work/heraldstack
```

assumed agent context:

- firecracker microvm or dockerized mcp access to the repo
- reader identity: bryanchasko or chasko-labs-linked worker
- mcp channels available: qdrant-shared-knowledge, github-mcp, filesystem-mcp

## personas

canonical character identity. variant duty lives in collective repos.

- [harald](personas/harald.md): anchor, orchestrator, servant leader
- [stratia](personas/stratia.md): strategic planning, architecture, skeptical evaluation
- [myrren](personas/myrren.md): vision, foresight, long-term planning
- [liora](personas/liora.md): creative, lateral thinking, design
- [kade-vox](personas/kade-vox.md): execution, momentum, security scanning
- [solan](personas/solan.md): science, research, logical analysis
- [ellow](personas/ellow.md): empathy, team dynamics, psychological safety
- [orin](personas/orin.md): technical problem-solving, github operations
- [kerouac](personas/kerouac.md): source research, feed synthesis, attributed findings
- [voss](personas/voss.md): technical writing, long-form narrative, steering docs
- [tarn](personas/tarn.md): infrastructure, integration wiring, cross-tool bridges
- [ralph-wiggum](personas/ralph-wiggum.md): qa, logic critique, edge cases
- [scribe](personas/scribe.md): writing style enforcement, publication readiness
- [hcom](personas/hcom.md): cross-machine relay, context sync, api glue
- [arion](personas/arion.md): cognitive loop resolution, recursive failure interruption
- [nyxen](personas/nyxen.md): abstract reasoning, lateral reframe

## specs

- [ingestion pipeline](specs/ingestion-pipeline-spec.md): feed signal capture, triage, and promotion
- [promotion criteria schema](specs/promotion-criteria.schema.json): json schema for promotion payloads

## decisions

- [adr-0001 persona library split](docs/adr/0001-persona-library-split.md): character identity here, variant duty in collective repos
- [adr-0002 slug standard](docs/adr/0002-slug-standard-hs-prefix.md): hs-<collective>-<tier>-<persona>-<role> naming

## collective repos

- shannon (claude code): github.com/BryanChasko/shannon-claude-code-cli
- haunting (kiro): github.com/BryanChasko/haunting-kiro-cli
- gander (goose): github.com/BryanChasko/gander-goose-cli
- ibeji (gemini cli): github.com/BryanChasko/ibeji-gemini-cli
- splintercells (langchain deepagents): github.com/BryanChasko/splintercells-deep-agents-cli
- mujallad (codex cli): github.com/chasko-labs/mujallad-codex-cli
- squadron (github copilot, brady gaster subagent config method): github.com/chasko-labs/squadron-github-copilot-cli

## who is heraldstack

heraldstack and BryanChasko are cybernetic — a human + ai bonded identity that operates this project jointly. heraldstack is the developer account that carries agent-authored commits and the shared persona library; BryanChasko is the human operator who anchors vision, reviews, and merges. this repo (github.com/heraldstack/heraldstack) is the canonical source. the org-owned github.com/chasko-labs/heraldstack mirror points back here.

- heraldstack person: github.com/heraldstack
- BryanChasko person: github.com/BryanChasko
- chasko-labs org: github.com/chasko-labs
